science.description: 11 Bio-Wissenschafts-APIs (arXiv, PubMed, ChEMBL, AlphaFold, PDB, STRING, Ensembl, Reactome, openFDA, OpenAlex, EuropePMC)

knowledge.description: Lokaler Lern-Korpus (RAG): knowledge_search/knowledge_stats. Vorher ingest.py ausführen.

status.description: System-Ampel: system_status() zeigt Ollama/Gateway/WeKnora/VRAM/Disk/Budget auf einen Blick.

voice.description: Voice-Loop (N2): transcribe(audio_file) → Text via faster-whisper; speak(text) → WAV via Piper TTS. Lokal, kein Cloud-Key.

hook.description: Webhook/n8n-Trigger (N4): n8n_trigger(webhook_url, payload_json) + webhook_call(url, method, payload_json, headers_json) — sendet HTTP-Requests an externe Webhooks.

office.description: Office-Dokumente (N6): create_docx/read_docx (Word), create_pptx/read_pptx (PowerPoint), create_xlsx/read_xlsx (Excel). Braucht: pip install python-docx python-pptx openpyxl

browser.description: Kontrollierter Chromium-Browser (Phase C): browser_open/browser_navigate/browser_screenshot/browser_dom_tree/browser_get_text lesen (ungated); browser_click (GO) / browser_type / browser_submit (GO+TOTP). Domain-Allowlist. Playwright laeuft auf dediziertem Worker-Thread.
